instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display next to the Spin button (currently shows '$2.50' per options.json).
Step 2: Read the current bet value and record it as starting_bet.
Step 3: Click the 'Bet -' button (left of the Spin button per options.json) repeatedly until the bet display shows '0.25' or stops decreasing.
Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.25' (the minimum value per spec.bet_mechanics.bet_sizes[0]=0.25, within ±1 ladder step tolerance).
